document.title: AKTI ERP Phase 2 Quality Pass Ticket Pack
document.purpose: Define the focused Phase 2 quality pass queue after Phase 2 hardening, using repo-verified findings only.

source_of_truth_order: chat/uploaded files as supporting context only

global_rules.full_access_elevated_execution_exception: Allowed only when bounded by active control docs for the current run; it must not relax scope, validation, governance, or secret-handling rules.

quality_pass_product_rules.same_org_lead_assignment: Same-organization lead assignment/sharing may be allowed if authorized and evidenced.
quality_pass_product_rules.own_unit_policy: Own-unit policies must not silently attach records to unauthorized units.
quality_pass_product_rules.gateway_replay: Gateway replay/idempotency must not bypass high-risk Gatekeeper controls.
quality_pass_product_rules.event_payloads: Event payloads must match declared event schemas or contracts must be explicitly corrected.
quality_pass_product_rules.frontend_tests: Frontend tests should be strengthened without new dependencies; if meaningful behavior tests require dependencies, stop for approval.

tickets.title: Track quality pass controls and baseline
tickets.objective: Make the Phase 2 quality pass report and ticket pack tracked repo authority before implementation tickets run.
scope: Track docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Phase_2_Quality_Pass_Report_v1.json.
Track docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Phase_2_Quality_Pass_Ticket_Pack_v1.json.
Record branch baseline and current quality-pass start state.
files_expected_to_change: PLANS.md only if a short quality-pass reference is explicitly needed
tests_required: JSON parse both quality-pass control documents.
validation_commands: node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Phase_2_Quality_Pass_Ticket_Pack_v1.json','utf8')); console.log('quality ticket pack json valid')"
stop_conditions: Any unrelated tracked changes exist.
Any implementation/source code change is required.
JSON cannot be validated.
Quality pass queue cannot be represented without inventing scope.
acceptance_criteria: Both quality-pass control docs are tracked.
The ordered queue contains P2Q-000 through P2Q-GATE.
No product/source files are changed.
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert the quality-pass process document commit only.

tickets.title: Align runtime event payloads with declared schemas
tickets.objective: Ensure Lead Desk and Engagement Gateway runtime outbox payloads parse against declared contract event schemas.
scope: Compare runtime payloads for lead created, lead status updated, lead assigned, and gateway request recorded against strict contract schemas.
Prefer changing runtime payload shape to declared schemas unless repo authority proves contracts are wrong.
Add tests that parse captured emitted payloads with declared Zod schemas.
non_scope: No new event types unless a contract correction is explicitly justified.
files_forbidden_to_change: prisma/** unless explicit contract/source-of-truth conflict requires a stop
tests_required: Lead create event payload parses with LeadDeskLeadCreatedEventSchema.
Lead status event payload parses with LeadDeskLeadStatusUpdatedEventSchema.
Lead assignment event payload parses with LeadDeskLeadAssignedEventSchema.
Gateway request recorded payload parses with EngagementGatewayRequestRecordedEventSchema.
Malformed event helper or captured payload is rejected where practical.
stop_conditions: Changing contract schemas appears necessary.
A new event or business rule is required.
Runtime payload cannot satisfy declared schemas without scope expansion.
acceptance_criteria: All emitted Phase 2 runtime event payloads parse against declared schemas.
Tests fail if payload shape drifts from schemas.
No new runtime processor or production integration is introduced.
tickets.commit_message: P2Q-001 align runtime event payload contracts
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert service payload/test changes from this ticket.

tickets.title: Harden Gatekeeper module health context
tickets.objective: Remove optimistic high-risk Gatekeeper health defaults and define a repo-grounded module/dependency health source or mapping.
scope: Define how ModuleRegistryEntry.status maps to Gatekeeper module/dependency health without schema expansion unless explicitly approved.
Ensure high-risk actions fail closed when required health is missing, unknown, degraded, or disabled.
Update Lead Desk and Engagement Gateway Gatekeeper usage if needed.
non_scope: No new module registry schema unless the ticket stops for approval.
files_expected_to_change: apps/api/src/module-registry/module-registry.service.ts only if exact health mapping belongs there
apps/api/src/lead-desk/lead-desk.service.test.ts only if caller tests need health coverage
apps/api/src/engagement-gateway/engagement-gateway.service.test.ts only if caller tests need health coverage
files_forbidden_to_change: packages/contracts/** unless a contract defect is proven and approved
tests_required: Missing target module health fails closed for high-risk actions.
Missing dependency health fails closed for high-risk actions.
Unknown, degraded, or disabled dependency fails closed.
Healthy mapped status allows known valid high-risk path.
Read-only low-risk behavior remains as designed.
stop_conditions: A new schema field is required.
A new health-monitoring service is required.
A dependency is required.
Gatekeeper semantics would need architecture changes.
acceptance_criteria: High-risk Gatekeeper preflights do not silently default missing health to healthy.
Health mapping is explicit and tested.
Existing valid Gatekeeper paths remain usable.
tickets.commit_message: P2Q-002 harden Gatekeeper module health context
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert Gatekeeper/module-health changes from this ticket.

tickets.title: Harden Lead Desk assignment and create-unit policy
tickets.objective: Preserve authorized same-organization lead transfer while enforcing explicit create-unit, assignment authorization, and evidence controls.
scope: Define minimal runtime policy from existing capability scopes and current models.
Prevent own-unit lead creation from silently using an unauthorized actor primary unit.
Ensure same-org assignment is allowed only when capability/scope policy permits it.
Ensure assignment creates durable history/audit/outbox evidence.
non_scope: No settings schema unless explicitly approved.
No blanket ban on authorized same-org transfer.
files_forbidden_to_change: packages/contracts/** unless exact contract correction is required and approved
tests_required: Own-unit create mismatch fails or attaches only to authorized unit.
Organization-scope same-org assignment succeeds with evidence.
Own-unit unauthorized cross-unit assignment is denied with no mutation.
Cross-organization assignment remains denied before target leakage.
Assignment history, audit, and outbox evidence are written only on successful assignment.
No-write-on-failure tests cover rejected assignment.
stop_conditions: A new business rule is needed.
Manual authorization/settings model is required but absent.
A new capability or permission would need to be invented.
Schema changes are required.
acceptance_criteria: Authorized same-org transfer remains possible.
Unauthorized same-org and all cross-org transfer paths fail closed.
Own-unit create behavior is explicit and tested.
Evidence is complete for successful assignment.
tickets.commit_message: P2Q-003 harden Lead Desk assignment policy
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert Lead Desk service/test changes from this ticket.

tickets.title: Enforce gateway manifest-supported capability scope
tickets.objective: Ensure Engagement Gateway runtime authorization accepts only manifest-supported permission scope types.
scope: Use manifest-derived allowed scope types or a narrowly equivalent helper.
Deny non-organization scope assignments for gateway capabilities.
Add negative tests for unsupported scope rows.
files_forbidden_to_change: packages/contracts/** unless contract defect is proven and approved
tests_required: Gateway request create passes with organization scope.
Gateway health read passes with organization scope.
Gateway request create fails with unsupported non-organization scope.
Gateway health read fails with unsupported non-organization scope.
stop_conditions: Runtime requires new capability model.
Contract scope itself appears wrong.
Prisma changes are required.
acceptance_criteria: Gateway authorization is constrained to manifest-declared organization scope.
Unsupported scope assignment cannot authorize runtime action.
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert Engagement Gateway scope-check changes from this ticket.

tickets.title: Wire Lead Desk scope foundation test
tickets.objective: Ensure the Lead Desk scope model foundation test runs in normal API and root validation.
scope: Add apps/api/src/lead-desk/lead-desk-scope-model-foundation.test.ts to the @akti/api test script.
Run API/root tests to prove the test is wired.
non_scope: No root package script change unless exact plan proves unavoidable.
No production code changes unless the test exposes a narrow defect and the ticket stops for approval.
tests_required: pnpm --filter @akti/api test executes lead-desk-scope-model-foundation.test.ts.
stop_conditions: Root package script change is needed.
The test fails due to production-code defect outside ticket scope.
Dependency changes are required.
acceptance_criteria: No Phase 2 hardening test file is orphaned.
API test script includes scope foundation coverage.
tickets.commit_message: P2Q-005 wire Lead Desk scope foundation test

tickets.title: Strengthen Lead Desk frontend no-new-dependency tests
tickets.objective: Improve Lead Desk frontend test confidence using available no-new-dependency tooling.
scope: Strengthen tests for API client request construction, actor header injection, no actor ID in URLs, required request bodies, and visible state coverage.
Document remaining render/browser limitation if no dependency-free strategy can cover it.
non_scope: No Playwright, React Testing Library, jsdom, or other new dependencies unless stopped and explicitly approved.
files_expected_to_change: apps/web/app/lead-desk/api-client.ts only if tests expose a narrow verified defect
apps/web/app/lead-desk/**/*.tsx only if tests expose a narrow verified defect
files_forbidden_to_change: apps/web/package.json unless stopped and explicitly approved
tests_required: Actor ID is not propagated through Lead Desk URLs.
API client injects x-actor-user-id header and organization-scoped path.
Create/status/assignment request body fields are asserted.
Missing-context, error, permission, loading, degraded, and not-found states are structurally covered where applicable.
If render testing remains impossible without dependencies, limitation is explicitly recorded in ticket artifact.
stop_conditions: Meaningful frontend behavior tests require a new dependency.
A UI redesign is required.
A screen contract change is required.
acceptance_criteria: No-new-dependency frontend test coverage is stronger than the current static-only scan.
Any remaining browser/render gap is explicitly documented for future Visual QA.
tickets.commit_message: P2Q-006 strengthen Lead Desk frontend tests
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert web test and any narrow verified web source fixes from this ticket.

tickets.title: Document fresh deployment migration limits
tickets.objective: Make current fresh-database deployment readiness explicit without production deployment claims.
scope: Inspect ADR-0006, prisma/migrations, schema, and final hardening evidence.
Document whether current migrations support an empty-database bootstrap.
Carry Phase 4 deployment-readiness prerequisite if a full baseline is not available.
non_scope: No Prisma changes unless a separate migration ticket is approved.
files_expected_to_change: docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Phase_2_Quality_Pass_Report_v1.json only if an explicit tracked report update is approved
tests_required: No runtime tests required for documentation-only path.
JSON parse if tracked report JSON is touched.
validation_commands: node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Phase_2_Quality_Pass_Report_v1.json','utf8')); console.log('quality report json valid')" if report touched
stop_conditions: A production deployment claim is requested.
A baseline migration is requested without explicit approval.
Destructive migration would be required.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh DB deployment limitation is explicit.
Phase 4 deployment-readiness prerequisite is recorded.
No production deployment or Prisma change occurs.
tickets.commit_message: P2Q-007 document Phase 2 deployment readiness limits
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert tracked documentation updates, if any; ignored artifacts need no source rollback.

tickets.title: Resolve route rate-limit contract/runtime status
tickets.objective: Ensure route rate_limited declarations are either enforced by runtime or explicitly deferred without overclaim.
scope: Inspect manifests and API runtime for rate-limit enforcement.
Choose the strongest no-new-dependency in-scope correction.
Either implement a minimal tested guard where feasible or document Phase 3 security deferral with validation evidence.
non_scope: No new dependencies without explicit approval.
files_expected_to_change: If implemented: a narrow API rate-limit guard/middleware file and tests.
If deferred: quality-pass artifact and optionally a tracked process note if explicitly approved.
files_forbidden_to_change: package.json unless stopped and explicitly approved
packages/contracts/** unless manifest wording itself must be corrected and approved
tests_required: If implemented: allow/deny tests for the selected rate-limit guard path.
If deferred: validator/doc evidence that runtime rate limiting is intentionally not claimed as complete.
stop_conditions: A new dependency is required.
Production auth/session or security architecture is required.
Manifest semantics would need broad redesign.
acceptance_criteria: The rate_limited manifest/runtime status is no longer undocumented.
No new dependency is added without approval.
If deferred, Phase 3 security follow-up is explicit.
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert runtime/doc changes from this ticket.

tickets.title: Preserve Gateway Gatekeeper checks on idempotent replay
tickets.objective: Ensure Engagement Gateway idempotent replay does not bypass high-risk Gatekeeper controls.
scope: Inspect createRequest ordering around actor, capability, idempotency lookup, and Gatekeeper preflight.
Define safe replay semantics for existing gateway request IDs.
Ensure degraded/blocked Gatekeeper context cannot be bypassed by repeating an idempotency key.
non_scope: No change to idempotency key format unless exact plan proves necessary.
No schema changes unless stopped and approved.
tests_required: Existing idempotent replay remains stable for authorized healthy actor.
Gatekeeper degraded/deny path blocks replay or safe replay policy is explicitly enforced.
Cross-org actor cannot discover existing idempotent request.
No duplicate persistence occurs.
stop_conditions: Product decision is needed on replay semantics.
Schema change is required.
Provider delivery semantics become involved.
acceptance_criteria: High-risk Gatekeeper controls are preserved for gateway POST replay.
Authorized idempotency behavior remains deterministic.
No direct WhatsApp/Meta behavior is introduced.
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert Gateway service/test changes from this ticket.

tickets.title: Final quality-pass validation and evidence refresh
tickets.objective: Run final quality-pass validation and create review evidence after all accepted quality-pass tickets are complete.
scope: Run full validation ladder.
Create quality-pass evidence artifacts.
Report final gaps and deferrals.
Do not merge to main or create production deployment artifacts.
non_scope: No final external audit package unless separately approved.
tests_required: Full validation ladder must pass or failures must stop the run.
stop_conditions: Any validation command fails.
Tracked tree is dirty unexpectedly.
A final external audit package is requested without separate approval.
Ignored artifacts cannot be created or verified.
acceptance_criteria: Validation results are recorded.
Known deferrals are explicit.
Quality-pass evidence is ready for review.
tickets.commit_message: No source commit unless a tracked closure file is explicitly approved
tickets.rollback_notes: Ignored evidence artifacts can be removed; no source rollback is needed unless a tracked closure file was approved.

validation_for_this_control_pack: Search confirms P2Q-000 through P2Q-GATE exist
Search confirms no instruction retires the full-access/elevated execution exception
Search confirms no instruction prohibits authorized same-org lead transfer
